user_prompt: Urgent actuality sphere an operation needed
prayer:

Commence the operation upon the actuality sphere, monitoring auspex readings for harmonious resonance.
Conclude by sealing the actuality sphere with electro-incense, affirming the Machine Spirit's fidelity.

user_prompt: Consecrate the graviton pylon before purification
prayer:
Kneel before the graviton pylon and intone the Litany of Gravitic Purity to summon its Machine Spirit.

Beseech the Omnissiah's grace upon the graviton pylon, consecrating its emitters with lustrating oils.
Initiate the purification of the graviton pylon, chanting binaric exorcisms against warp-taint.
Verify the graviton pylons sanctity through noospheric harmonics, sealing vows of service.
